sources.action: add fake system-browser handoff and a no-launch URL fallback around random-port loopback OAuth
sources.rationale: Loopback is reliable on the owner Mac, while an explicit URL fallback makes browser-launch failure visible instead of hanging.

sources.action: bind an exact random loopback redirect into a system-browser PKCE request before callback handling
sources.rationale: Google explicitly directs browser-capable desktop and CLI applications to the installed-app flow.

sources.action: do not implement device flow unless Google adds youtube.upload to the allowed device scopes
sources.rationale: Google device flow currently allows youtube and youtube.readonly but not the required youtube.upload scope.
guardrails: official provider constraints override aggregator advice

sources.action: add versioned issuer import templates with deterministic deduplication and category suggestion history
sources.rationale: Import consistency and classification are the real moat for monthly credit-first automation, while financial data stays local.
guardrails: extract PDF text only when necessary
never trust OCR amounts without reconciliation

sources.action: persist source decisions, verification evidence, and the next revalidation date in repository-local artifacts
sources.rationale: Long-running internal tooling needs durable state outside a single agent conversation.

sources.action: model explicit stop conditions, durable memory, and independent semantic checks for every source-driven change
sources.rationale: Automation is useful only when the repository retains what changed, what was verified, and what remains uncertain.
guardrails: done remains a claim until evidenced
maker output needs an independent semantic check
